recommended_path: Do not renew APROVADO yet. Tighten the repair contract so linked-data checks are fail-closed and internally consistent, then re-run the pre-approval critique.

findings.title: Repair predicate must be fail-closed for linked-data checks.
findings.rationale: The round 02 package allowed test-seed aggregate deletion when linked-data checks were explicitly skipped with a safe reason, while another section required unsupported or ambiguous relation checks to skip/report. That contradiction could permit deletion without affirmatively proving no non-test linked-data risk.
findings.suggested_action: Make aggregate delete eligible only when linked-data checks affirmatively pass. Unsupported, skipped, or ambiguous checks must skip the account and report the residual.
